_comment: Google Workspace setup guide for myfamousfinds.com

step_1_verify_domain.description: Add Google domain verification TXT record in Vercel DNS
instructions: Go to vercel.com → your project → Settings → Domains → myfamousfinds.com → DNS Records
Add new record: Type=TXT, Name=(leave empty for root @), Value=google-site-verification=my1vWF-xFvgmgNQdV5lqtmPMZ6Sgzxv7JYJFz9EaAec, TTL=60
Go back to Google Workspace admin and click 'Verify'
Note: DNS propagation can take a few minutes to 48 hours, but Vercel is usually fast (under 5 minutes)

step_2_update_mx_records.description: Switch MX records from AWS SES Inbound to Google Workspace in Vercel DNS
instructions: In Vercel DNS, DELETE the existing MX record: @ → inbound-smtp.us-east-1.amazonaws.com (priority 10)
Add these 5 Google Workspace MX records:
step_2_update_mx_records.impact: Inbound emails to *@myfamousfinds.com will now be delivered to Gmail instead of AWS SES. The SES inbound webhook (/api/ses/inbound) will stop receiving new emails.

step_3_update_spf.description: Update SPF record to authorize both AWS SES and Google Workspace
instructions: In Vercel DNS, find the existing root TXT record with value: v=spf1 include:amazonses.com ~all
Update it to: v=spf1 include:amazonses.com include:_spf.google.com ~all
This ensures both AWS SES (transactional emails from app) and Google Workspace (Gmail) can send as @myfamousfinds.com

step_4_setup_gmail.description: Set up Gmail accounts in Google Workspace Admin
instructions: Configure email routing rules if needed

step_5_app_considerations.description: Your app still sends transactional emails via AWS SES — this continues to work
details: AWS SES OUTBOUND (transactional emails) remains unchanged — the app sends from admin@myfamousfinds.com via SES
DKIM signing via SES continues to work — no changes needed
INBOUND email now goes to Gmail instead of the SES webhook at /api/ses/inbound
If you need inbound emails processed by the app, set up Gmail forwarding rules to forward to the SES inbound endpoint, OR use Google Workspace routing to forward a copy to the app webhook
